title: Show HN: The Fastest Way to Ship TanStack Apps
full_text:
Hi 👋, I'm Arif Hossain. I've spent the last 6 years in the TypeScript ecosystem, building real-world products. 
In 2024, I quit my job to build my own projects and share what I learn on YouTube. One of those projects, RetroUI, is now used by thousands of developers worldwide.

As an indie dev, I know how much time we waste setting up the same boring foundations over and over again. While there are many great starter kits for Next.js, TanStack Start is relatively new! But it's a great framework to build typesafe, full-stack application, and many industry experts have already started switching to it.

I believe, going forward TanStack Start will be the go-to framework for building applications Typescript. That' why I created this kit, to save you time and effort. It's a production-ready boilerplate that includes everything you need to launch your next SaaS.
